title: After PM claims Hezbollah fight not over, Trump says Israel 'PROHIBITED' from bombing Lebanon
snippet: Netanyahu claimed Hezbollah fight 'not over' despite ceasefire. Trump publicly rebuked Netanyahu: Israel 'PROHIBITED' from bombing Lebanon during ceasefire. Rare public US-Israel friction. Trump enforcing ceasefire against ally.
tag_reason: 트럼프의 이스라엘 폭격 '금지' 공개 경고는 미-이스라엘 관계의 새로운 긴장을 보여주는 신규 전개
